steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT ACCOUNT_NUMBER, ACCOUNT_NAME, ACCOUNT_VALUE FROM DFP_ITR_CVM WHERE CNPJ='02.998.611/0001-04' AND ANALYSIS_END_PERIOD_DATE = '2024-12-31' ORDER BY ACCOUNT_NUMBER;"}}
steps.name: cvm_base_query_tool

steps.arguments: {"inp":{"sql_query":"SELECT REPORT_DATE, ORDINARY_SHARES_ISSUED, ORDINARY_SHARES_TREASURY, PREFERRED_SHARES_ISSUED, PREFERRED_SHARES_TREASURY, TOTAL_SHARES_ISSUED, TOTAL_SHARES_TREASURY FROM CVM_SHARE_COMPOSITION WHERE CNPJ='02.998.611/0001-04' ORDER BY REPORT_DATE DESC LIMIT 1;"}}
steps.name: cvm_composition_query_tool
